positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a joyful astronaut floating among geometric constellations and planets. The style is clean, highly saturated, kawaii, and retro sci-fi inspired, suitable for screen printing. The astronaut should have a simple, friendly silhouette, surrounded by stylized, interconnected planetary rings (Saturn-like) and nebulas using bold pops of teal, magenta, deep indigo, and electric lime. Composition is centered, creating a powerful, balanced, and scalable design. Crisp outlines, solid color blocks, flat shading, maximum contrast, graphic design aesthetic, perfect for apparel art.
